calendar.matters:
Notice Of Motion And Motion To Approve Proposition 65 Settlement And For Entry Of [Proposed] Consent Judgment
Off Calendar Feb-20-2026 Advanced From Mar-20-26 To Feb-25-26 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 301

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Approve Proposition 65 Settlement And For Entry Of [Proposed] Consent Judgment
Off Calendar Feb-25-2026 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF JAY EPPS' Motion To Approve Proposition 65 Settlement And For Entry Of [Proposed] Consent Judgment.

The court grants the unopposed motion to approve the Proposition 65 settlement and consent judgment.

The court finds that the warning required by the settlement is in compliance with Proposition 65 (Health & Safety Code sections 25249.5 to 25249.14); that the award of attorney's fees pursuant to the settlement is reasonable under California law; and that, considering the factors set out in Health & Safety Code section 25249.7, subdivision (b)(2), and the facts asserted in the moving papers, the penalty amount is reasonable. Accordingly the motion is granted.

Proposed order and consent judgment submitted.

Judge: Christine Van Aken; Clerk: W. Trupek; Not Reported (301/CVA)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jul-03-2025 Set For Trial On Jul-13-26 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206
